field.label: Retroactivo
field.help: Fecha del antiguo valor del convenio

field.label: Extras50
field.expression:
SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > 0 and (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) < FICHADADIA.max_extras_50
then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) >= FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end)

field.label: Extras 100
field.expression: SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) - FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end)

select tipoliq FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = PERSONAL.IdCateg limit 1
field.label: Tipo Liq.

field.expression: select importe FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= STR_TO_DATE('[__fechahasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.idCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= STR_TO_DATE('[__fechahasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde DESC limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

select importe FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= STR_TO_DATE('[__fechaRetroactivo__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.idCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= STR_TO_DATE('[__fechahasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde DESC limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

field.label: Horas
field.expression: sum( ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when FICHADADIA.h2 > hegreso then hegreso else FICHADADIA.h2 end , case when FICHADADIA.h1 < hingreso then hingreso else FICHADADIA.h1 end )), 0) + ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when FICHADADIA.h4 > hegreso then hegreso else FICHADADIA.h4 end , case when FICHADADIA.h4 < hingreso then hingreso else FICHADADIA.h3 end )), 0) ) / 3600

field.label: % Adicional
field.expression: select porcentaje FROM RRHH_ADICIONALES where RRHH_ADICIONALES.legajo = PERSONAL.legajo and ((RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha <= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha and RRHH_ADICIONALES.hastaFecha >= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha) or ( RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha <= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha and RRHH_ADICIONALES.hastaFecha = '0000-00-00' )) order by RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha DESC limit 1

field.label: Máximo
field.expression: select maximo / 2 FROM RRHH_ADICIONALES where RRHH_ADICIONALES.legajo = PERSONAL.legajo and ((RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha <= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha and RRHH_ADICIONALES.hastaFecha >= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha) or ( RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha <= GEN_CALENDAR.fecha and RRHH_ADICIONALES.hastaFecha = '0000-00-00' )) order by RRHH_ADICIONALES.desdeFecha DESC limit 1

if.true: round(pesos50 + pesos100 + adic50 + Adicional + adic100 + DESC, 0)
